nasb.text: I myself will be surety for him; you may hold me responsible for him. If I do not bring him back to you and set him before you, then let me bear the blame before you forever.

esv.text: I will be a pledge of his safety. From my hand you shall require him. If I do not bring him back to you and set him before you, then let me bear the blame forever.

cnv.text: 我願意親自擔保他的安全，你可以從我手裡追回他。如果我不把他帶回來給你，交在你面前，我願終生承擔這罪。

ccb.text: 我亲自保证便雅悯的安全，你可以向我要人。我若不把他带回来见你，情愿一生担罪。

csbs.text: 我亲自为此担保，你可以从我手中要人。如果我不把他带回来，让他站在你面前，我就在你面前终生担罪。
